title: corylus sativa
intro: Corylus sativa, also known as hazel, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Corylus sativa include its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and vitamins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Corylus sativa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and certain types of cancer. Corylus sativa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or oil, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and other health concerns.
